assertions.assertion: Calls ConfigureDPoPTokensForScheme with the scheme name 'token' on builder.Services (IServiceCollection), NOT inside AddJwtBearer lambda
assertions.rationale: Does not call ConfigureDPoPTokensForScheme at all. Suggests custom middleware or handler implementation instead.

assertions.assertion: Registers a distributed cache (e.g., AddDistributedMemoryCache for dev, mentions Redis or similar for production)
assertions.rationale: Line 46 calls AddDistributedMemoryCache and comments mention Redis for production.

assertions.assertion: Configures AddJwtBearer with Authority and ValidTypes including 'at+jwt'
assertions.rationale: Lines 11-18 configure AddJwtBearer with Authority and ValidTypes = new[] { "at+jwt" }.
No mention of the Duende.AspNetCore.Authentication.JwtBearer package. Suggests checking for 'official Microsoft or community package' generically.
